channel.title: Joram Millenaar's Portfolio
channel.description: Writing on software engineering, local-first AI, and building products by Joram Millenaar.

item.title: What I'd Do Differently Building an Ambient Clinical Documentation System
item.description: What I learned building a clinical AI scribe, and what I'd build differently now

item.title: For engagement sake: Ship one thing
item.description: Shipping one seemingly simple thing that works beats shipping many things that might. The proof is that your users start engaging.

item.title: The growing attention deficit
item.description: Everyone is out for our attention, more than ever. And we're all disengaging with it all as a result

item.title: Building local AI in a sandboxed world
item.description: What trying to build a fully local semantic search plugin for Obsidian taught me about constraints, sandboxed environments, and real engineering trade-offs.
